home.title: LunaPos | POS System for the Nightlife Entertainment Industry
home.description: Next-generation POS system for hostess clubs, girls bars, snack bars, host clubs, and lounges. Manage your floor, billing, and attendance with a single iPad. Offline-ready for worry-free operations.

problems.subtitle: PROBLEMS
problems.title: Do any of these sound familiar?

items.0: Handwritten slips lead to errors and disputes at checkout
items.1: Tracking main nominations, in-store nominations, and douhan visits is messy and hard to stay on top of
items.2: Daily reports take hours to complete every night
items.3: The system goes down whenever there's an internet outage
items.4: Your current POS doesn't support nightlife-specific pricing structures
items.5: Calculating cast pay and back percentages is complicated and eats up hours every month

featureHighlights.subtitle: FEATURES
featureHighlights.title: What Makes LunaPos Different
featureHighlights.description: A dedicated POS system built with deep knowledge of the nightlife industry floor.

0.title: iPad Native
0.description: A dedicated iPad app built with Swift and SwiftUI. The native feel keeps things smooth and stress-free even during a busy shift.

1.title: Offline Support
1.description: Local-first architecture means every feature works without internet. Zero downtime during business hours.

details.1: Automatic data sync when connection is restored
details.2: Reliable redundancy for peace of mind

2.title: Built for Nightlife
2.description: Full support for the complex pricing structures unique to the nightlife industry — set charges, nomination fees, service rates, and douhan.

0.title: Nominations, Douhan & Billing
0.description: Manage main nominations, in-store nominations, and douhan visits per table, with automatic calculation of set charges, service rates, and tax. Dramatically streamlines the checkout process.

details.0: Switch between main nomination, in-store nomination, and no nomination
details.1: Link douhan cast members and auto-calculate douhan fees
details.2: Automatic calculation of set charges, service rates, and tax
details.3: Supports cash, card, and electronic money

1.title: Shift & Attendance Management
1.description: Clock in and out with a single tap from a photo grid of cast members. Automates shift tracking and attendance records.

details.3: Automatic reflection of working status on the website

2.title: Sales Reports & Daily Summaries
2.description: Automatically aggregates daily sales, individual cast performance, and menu rankings. Eliminates time spent on daily reports.

3.title: Fraud Prevention (Operation Logs)
3.description: Every action is automatically recorded. Price changes, discounts, and cancellations can be reviewed in real time from the admin panel.

details.1: History of price changes, discounts, and cancellations
details.2: Real-time review from the admin panel
details.3: Included as standard at no extra charge

4.title: Invoice (Qualified Invoice) Support
4.description: Issue receipts and official receipts that meet qualified invoice requirements. Easily toggled on or off in the settings screen.

details.0: Automatic printing of registration number (T + 13 digits)
details.1: Clear display of tax rate category and tax amount
details.2: Toggle on/off from the settings screen
details.3: Supports both receipts and official receipts

5.title: Payroll Calculation
5.description: Automatic calculation supporting each venue's unique payroll rules — commission rates, hourly wages, nomination commissions, and more.

details.1: Supports nomination, douhan, and drink commissions
details.2: Mixed calculation of hourly pay and performance-based pay

6.title: Customer Management
6.description: Centrally manage customer information including visit history, preferences, and assigned cast members. Elevate the quality of service.

details.0: Automatic recording of visit history and spend
details.2: Link customers to their preferred cast member

7.title: Web Admin Panel
7.description: Check sales and cast performance in real time from your smartphone or PC, anywhere. Manage your venue anytime, from anywhere.

details.0: Real-time view of sales and nomination counts
details.3: Compatible with smartphones, PCs, and tablets

8.title: Cast App
8.description: A dedicated iPhone app for cast members to check their personal sales, shifts, and pay. A boost for motivation.

details.0: View personal sales and nomination counts

9.title: Offline Support
9.description: Local-first architecture built on SwiftData means every feature works even during an internet outage. Operations never stop.

details.2: Reliable redundancy for peace of mind

pricing.subtitle: PRICING
pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.description: One straightforward plan. Your first 500 transactions are free.
pricing.freeNote: Your first 500 cumulative transactions are completely free with all features. No credit card required. See FAQ for details.
pricing.aiNote: We're exploring features like AI-powered menu auto-registration from photos to make initial setup even easier.

0.question: Can I start using it right away?
0.answer: Yes, you can start using it immediately after creating your account. Initial setup like menu items can be done from the admin dashboard. We're also exploring AI-powered auto-registration from photos of your menu to make setup even easier.

1.question: Can I export my data?
1.answer: Yes, you can download sales data, customer information, and more in CSV format from the admin dashboard. Perfect for tax filings or sharing with your accountant.

2.question: What devices does it work on?
2.answer: POS operations like billing run on iPad. The admin dashboard and cast screens are accessible from any smartphone or PC browser.

3.question: Can I cancel at any time?
3.answer: Yes, you can cancel on the spot anytime. Like Netflix or Spotify — start when you want, stop when you want. No contract commitments.

4.question: Is it free to use?
4.answer: Yes, completely free for your first 500 cumulative transactions. No credit card required. Even after 500 transactions, POS operations continue to work. The admin dashboard requires a monthly fee of ¥30,000 (tax included). Note: under the free plan, anonymized sales data will be used for industry analysis and service improvement. See our pricing section for details.

5.question: Can it handle our venue's unique payroll structure?
5.answer: Yes, flexible configuration is available to match each venue's payroll rules, including commission rates and hourly wage settings. That said, we may not be able to accommodate every payroll structure, so please feel free to contact us for details.

6.question: Is cast personal information safe?
6.answer: Yes, cast information can only be accessed from the admin dashboard and the cast's own app. Other cast members cannot see each other's information.

cta.title: Feel free to reach out anytime
cta.description1: Currently in development. Register in advance and you'll be among the first to hear when we launch.
cta.description2: Questions and inquiries are welcome via LINE or the contact form.

roadmap.subtitle: ROADMAP
roadmap.title: Development Roadmap
roadmap.description: We're building in stages. Here's a look at the progress across each phase.

0.label: Phase 1
0.title: POS System Specialized for Nightlife
0.description: A POS system optimized for hostess clubs, girls bars, lounges, snack bars, and host clubs. Runs on iPad, integrating floor management, billing, and cast management. Offline support ensures zero downtime during business hours.

0.title: Floor Management
0.description: Multi-room table management with real-time vacancy status

1.title: Billing & Checkout
1.description: Automatic calculation of set charges, nomination fees, and service rates

2.title: Cast Attendance
2.description: One-tap clock-in/out via a photo grid of cast members

3.title: Sales Reports
3.description: Automatic aggregation of daily sales and individual cast performance

1.label: Phase 2
1.title: Transforming Nightlife Hiring with POS Data
1.description: Building a nightlife job and talent matching service on the foundation of LunaPos sales data. A recruitment platform with unprecedented credibility, grounded in cast performance portfolios and venue operational data.

2.label: Phase 3
2.title: Funding Support
2.description: Supporting venue fundraising based on operational data from LunaPos. A platform that connects investors and venues through data-backed venue assessments.

3.label: Phase 4
3.title: Global Expansion — The World Standard Nightclub POS
3.description: Leveraging expertise built in Japan's nightlife industry, expanding globally starting with Singapore and Southeast Asia. A multilingual, multi-currency POS system for nightclubs, lounges, and bars worldwide.

features.subtitle: FEATURES
features.title: Features
features.description: LunaPos Floor delivers everything the nightlife industry needs on the floor, in a native iPad app.

company.subtitle: COMPANY
company.title: About
company.founderBio: Built a career as an engineer in international IT, telecom, and AI. Also involved in the nightlife entertainment industry in Japan and across Southeast Asia including Singapore — and built LunaPos out of firsthand frustration with existing POS systems.
company.missionTitle: Making Night Business Smarter, Through Technology.
company.missionDescription: Built by an engineer who knows the floor — creating what the nightlife entertainment industry truly needs. From streamlining operations for owners, to improving the working environment for cast members and staff, to enhancing the experience for guests, we're using technology to make a real difference.

infoValues.business: Development and provision of POS systems for the nightlife industry

career.subtitle: LUNA CAREER
career.title: Job Platform Concept
career.intro1: Reinventing nightlife job listings with POS data.
career.intro2: Bringing transparency and trust to the industry through "evidence-backed hiring."
career.whyTitle: Why Is LunaPos Getting into Recruitment?
career.whyDescription: In traditional recruitment, venues self-report their own conditions, and cast members have no way to know what the real environment is like until they show up. By grounding everything in the "facts" of POS operational data, LunaPos brings transparency and credibility to the hiring process.

0.title: Data-Backed Venue Ratings
0.description: Visualize a venue's operational health using POS sales data and attendance records. Assess whether a venue is actually worth working at — with data.

1.title: Cast Performance Portfolios
1.description: Accumulate nomination counts, sales contributions, and work history as each cast member's personal portfolio. A tangible asset for transfer negotiations.

2.title: Demand-Driven Hiring Recommendations
2.description: Suggest "now is the right time to hire" based on sales trends and peak period data.

3.title: End-to-End from Scheduling to Payroll
3.description: Post-hire attendance management and payroll calculation, seamlessly handled within LunaPos.

career.comparisonTitle: How It Differs from Existing Job Platforms

1.label: Income information
1.luna: Average income based on actual data

career.stepsDescription: Luna Career is planned to expand its features gradually as more venues adopt LunaPos. Spreading the POS itself is our top priority for now.
career.stepsNote: Luna Career is planned as Phase 2 of our development roadmap. We're currently prioritizing the development and stabilization of the core POS features.

1.title: Risk Visibility
1.description: Gain a data-backed view of investment risk indicators such as revenue stability, seasonal fluctuation, and cast retention rates.

2.title: Growth Potential Assessment
2.description: Analyze historical trends to gauge future growth potential. Makes it easier to identify venues with room to grow.

world.subtitle: LUNA WORLD
world.title: Global Expansion Program
world.description: Bringing the POS system built for Japan's nightlife industry to nightclubs, lounges, and bars around the world. We're working toward becoming the global standard for nightlife entertainment.
world.visionDescription: Japan's nightlife entertainment industry is a uniquely fascinating market, with its own pricing structures and hospitality culture. We plan to take the industry-specific expertise built with LunaPos and localize it for nightclubs, lounges, and bars in countries around the world.

0.name: Singapore
0.description: Southeast Asia's business hub, home to many Japanese-style clubs — the ideal location for our first overseas foothold.

1.name: Southeast Asia
1.description: Thailand, the Philippines, Malaysia, and other regions with thriving nightlife industries.

2.name: East Asia
2.description: Markets with similar hospitality cultures, including South Korea, Taiwan, and Hong Kong.

3.name: Western Markets
3.description: Expanding into North America and Europe, where the nightclub and bar market is massive.

world.challengesDescription: We're actively working on the following challenges in preparation for international expansion.

0.title: Multilingual Support
0.description: UI supporting English, Chinese, and the languages of each target country.

1.title: Multi-Currency & Payment Support
1.description: Billing in local currencies and support for payment methods in each country.

2.title: Regulatory Compliance
2.description: Adherence to nightlife-related laws and regulations in each country.

3.title: Localization
3.description: Customization to fit the hospitality culture and pricing structures of each country.
